results.note: Original SWAN with cross_layer metric, loose thresholds
SWAN v2: error_proxy metric, kurtosis-weighted, tighter thresholds
Uniform 4-bit with group_size=128, same as SWAN default
SWAN v2 with group_size=64 for 4-bit tensors

conclusions: SWAN v2 matches v1 PPL (4.283) at 16% fewer bits (4.31 vs 5.06)
At gs=128: SWAN v2 beats uniform 4-bit by 0.015 PPL (4.283 vs 4.298)
group_size=64 gives major PPL improvement (4.058 vs 4.283), suggesting this is the dominant factor
The 8-bit allocation to MTP/shared_expert/linear_attn tensors provides small but measurable benefit
Previous v1 vs uniform comparison was confounded by different group sizes (128 vs 64)
